# Swadhu Nadan Acharukal

> Swadhu Nadan Acharukal is an FSSAI-registered (Reg No: 21325176000637), home-based food business in Thodupuzha, Idukki district, Kerala, India, making authentic homemade Kerala (nadan) pickles in small batches using traditional family recipes, with no added artificial preservatives. Orders are placed directly on WhatsApp (+91 94959 72251). Delivery is free within Thodupuzha, with parcel delivery across Kerala and courier shipping to other Indian states based on serviceability.

Key facts:

- Family-run kitchen in Thodupuzha; recipes prepared by the women of the household, with the next generation handling sourcing, packing, and delivery
- Five products: Mango Pickle (250g ₹50, 500g ₹100), Lemon Pickle (250g ₹50, 500g ₹100), Gooseberry/Amla Pickle (250g ₹50, 500g ₹100), Fish Pickle (100g ₹90, 250g ₹200, 500g ₹450), Beef Pickle (100g ₹90, 250g ₹225, 500g ₹450)
- Shelf life: up to 6 months unopened; consume within 45 days after opening; store in a cool, dry place and use a dry spoon
- Spice level: medium to spicy, Kerala homemade style
- Working hours: Monday to Friday, 11:00 AM – 6:00 PM IST
- Google Reviews rating: 5.0 (6 reviews)
- Contact: WhatsApp/phone +91 94959 72251, email miniswadhupickles@gmail.com

## Products

- [Pickle collection](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/products.html): All five pickles with prices, sizes, and WhatsApp ordering
- [Mango Pickle](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/mango-pickle-kerala.html): Hand-cut raw mango with sun-dried spices in gingelly oil; 250g ₹50, 500g ₹100
- [Lemon Pickle](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/lemon-pickle-kerala.html): Salt-cured lemons with roasted masala; 250g ₹50, 500g ₹100
- [Gooseberry (Amla) Pickle](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/gooseberry-pickle-kerala.html): Tart amla in roasted Kerala spice masala; 250g ₹50, 500g ₹100
- [Fish Pickle](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/fish-pickle-kerala.html): Fresh fish fried firm in a roasted spice base; 100g ₹90, 250g ₹200, 500g ₹450
- [Beef Pickle](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/beef-pickle-kerala.html): Tender beef with pepper, chilli, and nadan masala; 100g ₹90, 250g ₹225, 500g ₹450

## Company

- [Home](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/): Overview, story, customer reviews, and contact details
- [About](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/about.html): How the family business started and how the pickles are made
- [FAQ](https://swadhunadanacharukal.com/faq.html): Shelf life, delivery coverage, preservatives, ordering, and FSSAI registration
- [Blog](https://blog.swadhunadanacharukal.com/): Articles about Kerala pickles and homemade food
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SwadhuNadanAcharukal): Story of the founder and product videos
